anti_patterns_to_reject: root + verb + mode templates without a source lesson
proof targets that do not name a file, field, manifest, report, or final-report boolean
candidate generation used as implicit permission for streaming, digest, or active memory mutation
large budgets assigned to a small number of generic seeds
next_operator_validation_command: python -c <lightweight JSONL structural validation against the seven output files>; do not run 100k generation until accepted
novelty_controls: Use 180 refined scenario families rather than stretching a small seed set.
Keep every expansion budget at 83 or 84 so no seed can dominate the later 100k run.
Require concrete decision constraints, repo-specific negative traps, observable proof targets, and next-time behavior deltas in every seed.
Cover all 10 level bands and source-path categories before later factory generation.

previous_problem.decision: Previous 100k was clean but low-novelty because 48 seeds expanded into repeated drills.
